tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @phi_between_barriers(i1 %cond, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  br i1 %cond, label %bb_t, label %bb_f

bb_t:
  br label %merge

bb_f:
  br label %merge

merge:
  %ptr = phi ptr [ %p1, %bb_t ], [ %p2, %bb_f ]
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.outside_scope_reason: PHI nodes are not explicitly mentioned in the summary's safety predicate description (which only lists getelementptr and ctlz as examples of skippable instructions). This tests that PHI nodes are correctly identified as safe to skip over during lookahead.
